packaging_environment_state: The packaging sandbox cannot fetch/process the required multi-gigabyte public corpora and live APIs. No quota files were fabricated. The included GitHub Actions/local full builder performs the network-backed materialization after manual push.
accuracy_policy: No fabricated songs, artists, listen/view counts, media associations, or quota padding. Exact cumulative counters, chart-window aggregates, scores, and proxies are explicitly distinguished and sourced.

full_build_targets.vocaloid: all verified >=10,000,000 cumulative Spotify streams found in defensible source coverage; cap 10,000
full_build_targets.megalist: deduplicated union of all requested lists
full_build_targets.countries: top 1,000 unique songs for every dynamically detected Spotify regional country/territory chart

completion_rule: Do not treat the repository as fully complete until post-build STATUS.json says completion_summary.all_requested_lists_complete=true, including spotify_country_lists_complete=true, and validation/target reports agree. Conditional/finite corpora and country shortfalls are never padded.
notes: Fixed-size categories are only marked complete when the requested row count is actually materialized.

Vocaloid qualification uses a stricter cumulative Spotify count channel: verified seeds plus Zenodo Spotify-API-derived snapshot and/or live Kworb overlay; chart-history totals and noisy cross-platform snapshot outliers cannot qualify a song by themselves.
VocaDB scanning is rate-paced and bounded by default to respect public API usage guidance; corpus completeness is never falsely asserted from a partial scan.
VTuber corpora are never padded with non-VTuber or unverified songs if verified source coverage is smaller than the requested cap.

The initial push triggers the full-high-accuracy-build workflow, which downloads public sources/APIs, builds, validates, writes reports, and commits generated datasets when workflow write permission is enabled.

Country lists are discovered dynamically from the Spotify regional chart index and require exactly 1,000 source-backed unique songs per detected market; country chart totals exclude streams earned while a song is outside the daily Top 200.

All country lists are included in the final megalist after country-level evidence is collapsed per song; distinct country chart totals are preserved in extra.country_chart_appearances and never mislabeled as lifetime Spotify streams.
